name: Chicken Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken broth, chili powder, lemon pepper, and chopped jalapeno pepper together.
2. Add the Velvetta cheese and bring to a boil until slightly thickened.
3. Stir in the sour cream.
4. Lay flour tortillas on a baking sheet. Place one at a time on the tortilla.
5. Add onion and chicken mixture to each tortilla, rolling up seam side down.
6. Arrange the rolled tortillas in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, seam side down.
7. Pour cheese sauce over the enchiladas.
8. Bake for about 45 minutes until the sauce is bubbly.
9. Cover with grated cheese and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Serve with picante or salsa sauce and sour cream on top.
